remediation_steps.next_best_action: Investigate the HP LaserJet Pro M404dn (CT-PR-00742) on floor 7 that is printing garbled characters from multiple computers, which indicates a printer hardware or firmware issue rather than a client-side problem.

Check the toner cartridge and print drum for damage or incorrect installation

If issue continues after reset, arrange for hardware service or replacement

Replace any worn components identified during inspection

remediation_steps.next_best_action: Prioritize this repeat ticket for the Dell Latitude 5540 blue screen issue. KERNEL_DATA_INPAGE_ERROR typically indicates a failing hard drive or memory issue. Run Dell ePSA diagnostics on the Dell Latitude 5540, focusing on hard drive and memory tests
Check Windows Event Viewer for disk and memory errors correlating with the BSOD timestamps
If hardware failure is confirmed, initiate immediate device replacement or repair under warranty
Follow up with the reporter personally to confirm the issue is resolved after repair
